title: Why Aren't Businesses Using AI Agents Yet? Experts Explain! #shorts
summary: Agentic AI adoption is slow because the technology is still in its infancy, not due to lack of potential. This mirrors early-stage LLM adoption, with businesses now racing to harness the emerging capability.
writeup: This short addresses why business adoption of AI agents remains slow, attributing the lag to the technology being early in its development rather than any shortfall in potential. The video draws a parallel to the early stage of LLM adoption, noting that businesses are now moving quickly to take advantage of the emerging agentic capability.
